title: Rainbow Pride Logo
description: Changes the main Minecraft Logo to be rainbow pride!
body:
# Rainbow Pride Logo
**Rainbow Pride Logo is one of eight resource packs to change the main Minecraft Logo to be Pride featured.**
Rainbow Pride logo changes the main Minecraft logo to be a simplistic, sharp, clean logo striped with the classic rainbow Pride flag. **Should work for any version, but 1.21.4 and 1.21.5 are the only confirmed ones. I don't see why any other version wouldn't work.**

## Rainbow Pride Meaning
**The Rainbow Pride Flag** simply represents the entire Pride community! That means it represents Gay people, Enby (or non-binary) people, Lesbians, and everyone in between!
### Others
**The Rainbow Pride Flag is nice, but supporting other Pride communities individually is nice, too!** [Check out my other Resource Packs](https://modrinth.com/user/Darkcloak) to show support!
- [**Rainbow Pride Logo**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/rainbow-pride-logo)
- [**Trans Logo**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/trans-logo)
- [**Gay Logo**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/gay-logo)
- [**Lesbian Logo**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/lesbian-pride-logo)
- [**Aroace Logo**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/aroace-logo)
- [**Enby Logo**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/enby-logo)
- [**Asexual Logo**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/asexual-logo)
- [**Aromantic Logo**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/aromantic-logo)
- [**Pansexual Logo**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/pansexual-logo)
- [**Fluid Logo**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fluid-logo)
- [**Bisexual Logo**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bisexual-logo)
- [**Intersex Logo**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/intersex-logo)
